CustomField.description: To determine the scope of unit recognition: - None - Recognition is limited to programs tied to the same Academic Profile. - All Academic Profiles - Enrolled and completed units are recognized across all programs and academic profiles.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: To determine the scope of unit recognition: - None - Recognition is limited to programs tied to the same Academic Profile. - All Academic Profiles - Enrolled and completed units are recognized across all programs and academic profiles.
CustomField.label: Auto Unit Recognition Scope
